name: context-vault
description: Versioned Obsidian context for Codex projects.

interface.shortDescription: Resume work from a versioned Obsidian vault.
interface.longDescription: Loads source-linked project context from Obsidian and writes reviewed, time-aware project memory.
defaultPrompt: Resume this project from my Context Vault.
Capture this decision in my Context Vault.
Why did we choose the current approach?
